text:
Every adventure begins with a choice.​
Which HYDROCONQUEST will you choose?​

#Longines #HydroConquest #EleganceIsAnAttitude​

The new HYDROCONQUEST reinterprets an icon for the modern explorer, seamlessly combining proven performance with refined sporty elegance. 

#Longines #HydroConquest #EleganceIsAnAttitude

A frosted‑blue dial, ceramic bezel, and a self‑winding mechanical movement with a silicon balance-spring for exceptional precision: introducing the new HYDROCONQUEST.​
​
#Longines #HydroConquest #EleganceIsAnAttitude​

The new HydroConquest has arrived, and it's a stunner! I can't help but feel that this watch brings with it a sense of lightness and dignity. For me, It's evocative of spring and summer shores, glorious docksides and with them the promise of discovery. Yet another elegant classic from Longines.

#Longines 

#HydroConquest 

#EleganceIsAnAttitude

@Longines

Stand out with the redesigned HYDROCONQUEST. Introducing a first for the collection: a stainless-steel Milanese mesh bracelet for exceptional comfort. ​

#Longines #HydroConquest #EleganceIsAnAttitude

Henry Cavill moves with the rhythm of the tide, between land and sea, with his new HYDROCONQUEST.​
​
#Longines #HydroConquest #EleganceIsAnAttitude​

Bold refinement for every adventure, with a redesigned dial, a reworked ceramic bezel and a newly introduced Milanese mesh bracelet.​
​
Discover the next-generation HYDROCONQUEST.​

#Longines #HydroConquest #EleganceIsAnAttitude​

Freedom. Motion. Performance.​

The new HYDROCONQUEST debuts with a campaign starring LONGINES Ambassador of Elegance Henry Cavill, unveiling a collection of timepieces that blend robust functionality with understated elegance.​

#Longines #HydroConquest #EleganceIsAnAttitude​

The new HYDROCONQUEST is here.​
Discover the collection. ​
